<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1920 1080" font-family="'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <!-- Background Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0a0f1c"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#060b14"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cardGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a2235"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#111827"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cardHoverGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1e2a40"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#151e30"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="headerGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0d1525"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a101e"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Status Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="greenGrad" x1="0" y1="1" x2="0" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00d97e"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7dd3fc"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="warnGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffb547"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff6b35"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="critGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff4d6d"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c81d3f"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Glow Effects -->
    <filter id="glowGreen" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
      <feComposite in="SourceGraphic" in2="blur" operator="over"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glowWarn" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="blur"/>
      <feComposite in="SourceGraphic" in2="blur" operator="over"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glowCrit" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="8" result="blur"/>
      <feComposite in="SourceGraphic" in2="blur" operator="over"/>
    </filter>

    <!-- Furnace Glow -->
    <radialGradient id="furnaceGlowGrad" cx="50%" cy="80%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff6b35" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff6b35" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <!-- Drop Shadow -->
    <filter id="dropShadow" x="-5%" y="-5%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="8" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#000" flood-opacity="0.4"/>
    </filter>

    <!-- Hover Shadow (stronger) -->
    <filter id="dropShadowHover" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="140%" height="150%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="12" stdDeviation="10" flood-color="#00d97e" flood-opacity="0.3"/>
    </filter>

    <!-- Pulse Animation for Warn -->
    <style>
      @keyframes pulse-warn {
        0%, 100% { opacity: 0.2; }
        50% { opacity: 0.8; }
      }
      @keyframes pulse-crit {
        0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1); }
        50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.3); }
      }
      @keyframes fill-rise {
        from { height: 0; }
      }
      @keyframes rotate-fan {
        from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
        to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
      }
      @keyframes spin-slow {
        from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
        to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
      }
      @keyframes fade-in {
        from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
        to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
      }
      .warn-pulse { animation: pulse-warn 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .crit-pulse { animation: pulse-crit 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .fill-anim { animation: fill-rise 0.8s ease-out forwards; }
      .fan-blade { transform-origin: center; animation: rotate-fan 2s linear infinite; }
      .slow-spin { transform-origin: center; animation: spin-slow 8s linear infinite; }
      
      /* Fixed hover effects - no transform movement to prevent jitter */
      .card { cursor: pointer; }
      .card:hover .card-bg { 
        fill: url(#cardHoverGrad); 
        filter: url(#dropShadowHover);
      }
      .card:hover {
        /* Removed transform to prevent high-frequency movement/jitter */
      }
    </style>
  </defs>

  <!-- BACKGROUND -->
  <rect width="1920" height="1080" fill="url(#bgGrad)"/>

  <!-- DECORATIVE GRID LINES -->
  <g opacity="0.03">
    <line x1="0" y1="200" x2="1920" y2="200" stroke="#7dd3fc" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="400" x2="1920" y2="400" stroke="#7dd3fc" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="600" x2="1920" y2="600" stroke="#7dd3fc" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="800" x2="1920" y2="800" stroke="#7dd3fc" stroke-width="1"/>
  </g>

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="90" fill="url(#headerGrad)"/>
  <rect x="0" y="90" width="1920" height="2" fill="#1e3a5f"/>
  
  <!-- Header Logo Area -->
  <g transform="translate(32, 20)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="40" height="40" rx="8" fill="#1e3a5f" opacity="0.5"/>
    <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="12" fill="none" stroke="#7dd3fc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="4" fill="#7dd3fc"/>
    <text x="56" y="18" fill="#7dd3fc" font-size="11" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="4">LITMUS EDGE</text>
    <text x="56" y="34" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" letter-spacing="2">SP4 SINTER PLANT</text>
  </g>

  <text x="180" y="48" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="28" font-weight="700">Plant Overview — Asset Monitoring</text>

  <!-- Right-side Header Info -->
  <g transform="translate(1400, 20)">
    <text x="488" y="14" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="1">DEVICE: SP4Iba  •  DRIVER: DeviceHub Agent</text>
    <text x="488" y="30" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="1">DB: tsdata  •  739 tags via NATS</text>
    
    <!-- Live indicator -->
    <circle cx="488" cy="52" r="4" fill="#00d97e" filter="url(#glowGreen)">
      <animate attributeName="opacity" values="1;0.4;1" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </circle>
    <text x="480" y="56" fill="#00d97e" font-size="11" text-anchor="end" id="header_updated">● Updated: --:--:--</text>
  </g>

  <!-- KPI STRIP -->
  <g transform="translate(28, 105)" class="fade-in">
    <!-- KPI 1 -->
    <g class="card">
      <rect class="card-bg" x="0" y="0" width="370" height="90" rx="12" fill="url(#cardGrad)" stroke="#1e3a5f" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#dropShadow)"/>
      <!-- Icon -->
      <rect x="15" y="15" width="18" height="18" rx="4" fill="#00d97e" opacity="0.15"/>
      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="6" fill="none" stroke="#00d97e" stroke-width="2"/>
      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="2" fill="#00d97e"/>
      <text x="42" y="30" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" letter-spacing="2" font-weight="600">ASSETS WITH LIVE DATA</text>
      <text id="kpi_assets_value" x="20" y="72" fill="#00d97e" font-size="36" font-weight="700" filter="url(#glowGreen)">--/45</text>
      <text id="kpi_assets_pct" x="350" y="72" fill="#64748b" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="end">--%</text>
    </g>

    <!-- KPI 2 -->
